Fixture sources:

- `formulae.xlsx`
- `contains_chartsheets.xlsx`
- `date_1904.xlsx`

Downloaded from the openpyxl test corpus:

- Repository: `ericgazoni/openpyxl`
- Paths:
  - `openpyxl/tests/test_data/reader/`
  - `openpyxl/tests/test_data/genuine/`
- URL base: `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ericgazoni/openpyxl/master/openpyxl/tests/test_data/`

These files are used as real-world XLSX fixtures for integration tests of `formualizer.recalculate_file()`.
